narrative:
Southern Point (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,176 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
